data.biography:
Plan attended Dusit Thani College. Apart from being an actor, Plan is a member of the project group "TEMPT". They released their first single called "Tell me this is love" on July 24th of 2019.

Plan made his acting debut in the 2016 series "Make It Right: The Series" playing Wit, the best friend of the main character, Fuse. In 2018, he gained popularity when he portrayed Can in "Love By Chance" alongside "Mean" Phiravich Attachitsataporn. The pair soon became popular for their portrayal of their characters and landed a spin-off.

Today, Plan is an artist under TV Thunder.
data.name: Rathavit Kijworalak
รัฐวิทย์ กิจวรลักษณ์
